tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the complete contents of a file from the file system. Only works within allowed directories.

path.description: Path to the file to read

tools.name: read_multiple_files
tools.description: Read the contents of multiple files simultaneously. Failed reads for individual files won't stop the entire operation.

paths.description: Array of file paths to read

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Create a new file or completely overwrite an existing file with new content. Use with caution as it will overwrite existing files without warning.

path.description: Path where to write the file

content.description: Content to write to the file

tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: Make line-based edits to a text file. Each edit replaces exact line sequences with new content. Returns the file content after all edits are applied.

path.description: Path to the file to edit

tools.name: create_directory
tools.description: Create a new directory or ensure a directory exists. Can create multiple nested directories in one operation.

path.description: Path of the directory to create

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: Get a detailed listing of all files and directories in a specified path.

path.description: Path of the directory to list

tools.name: directory_tree
tools.description: Get a recursive tree view of files and directories as a JSON structure.

tools.name: move_file
tools.description: Move or rename files and directories. Can move files between directories and rename them in a single operation.

source.description: Source path of the file or directory

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Recursively search for files and directories matching a pattern. Searches through all subdirectories from the starting path.

tools.name: get_file_info
tools.description: Retrieve detailed metadata about a file or directory including size, creation time, last modified time, permissions, and type.

path.description: Path to the file or directory

tools.name: list_allowed_directories
tools.description: Returns the list of directories that this server is allowed to access.
